data.title: First-quarter 2026 results released by The Children’s Place.
data.description: A new study has revealed alarming statistics on the state of global food insecurity. According to the report, approximately 2 billion people worldwide are experiencing moderate to severe food insecurity. The study also disclosed that 811 million people are classified as chronically hungry. These numbers represent a significant increase from previous years and highlight the urgent need for action to address this escalating crisis. The findings underscore the importance of implementing effective strategies to ensure access to an adequate and nutritious food supply for all individuals.

data.title: SpaceX Closes 19% Above IPO Pricing; It's Already The Sixth-Largest Company
data.description: A total of $75 billion was raised, surpassing the combined amount raised by all Initial Public Offerings (IPOs) globally this year. Following its IPO, SpaceX closed 19% higher than its initial pricing, making it the sixth-largest company.

data.title: Aqua New Jersey President Natalie Chesko Recognized for Outstanding Achievements in Construction Industry
data.description: Natalie Chesko, President of Aqua New Jersey, was recognized for her leadership in the water utility sector in Hamilton. The New Jersey Alliance for Action awarded Chesko during the 6th annual Salute to Women in Construction. The event highlights women's contributions to the construction industry. Chesko, with over two decades of experience in engineering and utilities, was honored for her significant impact on the sector.
MATT HOLT SAID TO NEAR $12 BILLION DEAL FOR ENSEMBLE HEALTH

data.title: Lineage, Inc. Declares Dividend for Second-Quarter 2026
data.description: Lineage, Inc., a global temperature-controlled warehouse REIT, has declared a cash dividend of $0.5325 per share for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on July 21, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026. Lineage, Inc. (NASDAQ: LINE) is known as the world's largest in its industry.

data.title: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend on Common Stock
data.description: In New York, TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: TRTX) declared a cash dividend of $0.24 per share for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on July 24, 2026, to common stockholders recorded by June 26, 2026. TRTX is a commercial real estate finance firm specializing in originating, acquiring, and managing predominantly first mortgage loans secured by institutional properties.

data.title: SpaceX Stock Closes Up 19% In Record-Shattering IPO Debut
data.description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp., trading as SPCX on NASDAQ, had a historic first day of trading, closing at $160.95 per share, marking a 19.22% increase from its $135 IPO price. The company made headlines with the largest IPO to date, raising an impressive $75 billion by selling 555.6 million primary shares. Opening at $150, the stock immediately displayed strong demand from both institutional and retail investors, surpassing the offering price. Trading throughout the session was volatile yet primarily upward trending. This information can be found in detail on financial news websites.

data.title: Hotelier Robert Balzebre Opens Solei Beach Club at the Kimpton Surfcomber Hotel
data.description: A new oceanfront day club spanning 11,500 square feet has recently opened in South Beach, offering a unique coastal-Spain ambiance. The establishment provides private cabanas, a Mediterranean menu featuring seafood, and convenient access to both the pool and beach. Located in Miami Beach, the day club is open to the public, marking an exciting addition to the local scene.
MSCI: SPACEX ADDED TO STANDARD AND LARGE CAP INDEXES

data.title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies Announces Initial Dividends and NYSE Listing for Series A Preferred Stock
data.description: The board of directors at Bitmine has announced the initiation of cash dividends for the Company's 9.50% Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A Preferred Stock, which has been authorized for listing on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "BMNP". Trading for this preferred stock is set to begin on Tuesday, June 16, 2026. This move is expected to provide investors with a steady income stream in the coming years.

data.title: NewLake Capital Partners Issues Second Quarter 2026 Common Stock Dividend of $0.43 per Share
data.description: On June 12, 2026, NewLake Capital Partners, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.43 per share for the second quarter of 2026. This amount equates to an annualized dividend of $1.72 per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on July 15, 2026, to common stockholders recorded as of the closing of business on June 30, 2026. NewLake is a prominent provider of real estate capital to state-licensed cannabis operators.

US bank deposits fell to $19.296 trln from $19.338 trln in prior week

data.title: Black Hills Corp. Requests Rate Review in Colorado
data.description: Black Hills Corp. disclosed today that its Colorado electric utility, listed under NYSE as BKH, has submitted a rate review application to the Colorado Public Utilities Commission. The application is aimed at recuperating the essential capital infrastructure and operational expenses needed to provide secure, dependable electric service to more than 102,000 customers in Southern Colorado.

data.title: M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. Announces Cancellation of Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders to Approve Business Combination
data.description: On June 12, 2026, M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. (Nasdaq: MBAV), a special purpose acquisition company, made the decision to cancel its extraordinary general meeting of shareholders. This meeting was intended for shareholders to vote on important matters, but it has been called off. The company did not provide a reason for this cancellation. This move comes amidst a period of uncertainty and change in the business world. Shareholders and investors are left awaiting further updates and announcements from the company.

data.title: SEEM Board Meeting and Annual Meeting of Participants and Stakeholders Scheduled on June 24
data.description: On June 24, 2026, at 3 p.m. EST, the board meeting and annual meeting of participants and stakeholders of the Southeast Energy Exchange Market will take place in Atlanta. The event will be streamed live via a webcast of the conference call for all interested parties to attend virtually.

data.title: Target Announces Voting Results from 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On June 10, 2026, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) revealed the outcomes of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders conducted in Minneapolis. At the meeting, all 12 board of directors' nominees were elected by the shareholders. Additionally, the appointment of certain individuals was also ratified.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. June 2026 Dividend Announcement and May Financial Update
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per share for June 2026. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on July 15, 2026 to stockholders of record as of a specified date.

data.title: BNY Announces Redemption of 582,500 Depositary Shares, Each Representing a 1/100th Interest in a Share of its Series H Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
data.description: On June 12, 2026, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY), a leading global financial services company, revealed its plan to repurchase all remaining shares of its Series H Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (known as the Series H Preferred Stock). This redemption marks a significant move by BNY to consolidate its financial assets. The stock being repurchased holds a substantial value in the market, and the decision is poised to impact the company's standing in the industry.

data.title: 4DMT Announces New Employment Inducement Grants
data.description: On June 9, 2026, 4D Molecular Therapeutics revealed that the compensation committee of its board of directors approved the granting of 66,900 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to seven new non-executive employees. These RSUs were awarded under the Company's 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan, as amended. This move falls under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market, allowing for equity grants to attract new employees to join the organization. 4D Molecular Therapeutics, a prominent late-stage biotechnology firm, is focused on developing targeted therapeutics that could revolutionize treatment approaches and offer significant advantages to patients.
